## Summary

<!-- Describe the change in one or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Tooling / CI (`chore:`, `ci:`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor:`)
- [ ] Performance (`perf:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] `make all` passes locally (lint + vuln + test + e2e)
- [ ] Tests have been added or updated where appropriate
- [ ] `README.md` has been updated if the public surface changed
- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) — **required** for Release Please to pick the correct version bump
